penalties.description: Maximum time reached without completing the tail cut inside the trainer.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion. Claude reported incomplete task at 180 seconds while GPT reported completion at 65 seconds with tail cut phase. Given the fundamental nature of this disagreement and the automatic zero condition for incomplete tasks, the more conservative incomplete assessment is adopted.

disagreements.rationale: Fundamental disagreement on task completion. The incomplete task condition takes precedence and results in automatic zero score regardless of timing.

claude_value.description: Maximum time reached without completing the tail cut inside the trainer.

gpt_value.description: The loop was positioned slightly above the intended mark.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete task is an automatic zero condition that supersedes all other penalties. If the task was truly incomplete, positioning penalties become irrelevant.
Consistent with the incomplete task determination. If tail cut was not completed within the time limit, it should not be listed as a detected phase.
Incomplete task results in automatic zero score per FLS rubric, regardless of other performance metrics.
